summary: Verified Dropshipper to Revendeur renaming throughout the system. All features working correctly: Revendeur Dashboard, Catalogue with prices, Registration page, Admin Revendeurs section, Navbar link, and Homepage button.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed backend /api/admin/revendeurs endpoint to return 'revendeurs' key instead of 'dropshippers' for frontend compatibility
All /api/revendeur/* route aliases working correctly, pointing to /api/dropshipper/* endpoints
Frontend correctly uses 'Revendeur' terminology throughout (AuthPage, Navbar, Dashboard, Registration)
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed admin_get_revendeurs and api_admin_get_revendeurs to return 'revendeurs' key
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dropshipper to Revendeur renaming complete. All routes work: /revendeur (dashboard), /devenir-revendeur (registration), /api/revendeur/* (backend aliases). Admin section shows 'Revendeurs' with correct data. Stripe payment is MOCKED.

Revendeur Dashboard (/revendeur).details: Dashboard loads with 'Revendeur' branding in sidebar, shows stats, catalogue, products, orders, earnings tabs

Revendeur Catalogue.details: Products visible with normal and promo prices, discount badges, 'Ajouter' buttons

Registration Page (/devenir-revendeur).details: French registration form with 'Devenir Revendeur' heading, all form fields present

AuthPage Revendeur Option.details: 'Revendeur' option visible in role selection (not 'Dropshipper'), redirects to /devenir-revendeur

Admin Revendeurs Section.details: Shows 'Revendeurs' in sidebar, 'Gestion Revente' heading, list of 7 revendeurs with correct data

Navbar Espace revendeur.details: 'Espace revendeur' link visible for logged-in revendeur users

Homepage Devenir Revendeur.details: 'Devenir Revendeur' button visible in footer, navigates to /devenir-revendeur

bug_fix_applied.issue: Admin /api/admin/revendeurs endpoint was returning 'dropshippers' key instead of 'revendeurs'
bug_fix_applied.fix: Updated admin_get_revendeurs and api_admin_get_revendeurs functions to transform response key from 'dropshippers' to 'revendeurs'
